criteria.description: WP01 Auth/API Client Stabilization is reviewed and approved with AuthProvider hydration contract preserved and API client behavior covered.
criteria.evidence: WP01 accepted after frontend Jest coverage for auth/API client behavior passed.
criteria.notes: Recorded in WP01 activity log and status events.

criteria.description: WP02 Cart Checkout/Menu Consolidation is reviewed and approved with central API client usage and canonical cart menu behavior preserved.
criteria.evidence: WP02 accepted after cart/menu tests passed.
criteria.notes: Recorded in WP02 activity log and status events.

criteria.description: WP03 Frontend Lint/Build Gates is reviewed and approved with lint, Jest, and build gates green through Docker Compose validation.
criteria.evidence: docker compose frontend lint, test -- --runInBand, and build passed in the WP03/WP04 lane validation path.
criteria.notes: Recorded in WP03 activity log and status events.

criteria.description: WP04 CI Baseline is reviewed and approved with GitHub Actions backend PostgreSQL gates, frontend gates, CI/local divergence notes, jsdom noise handling, and product no-image coverage.
criteria.evidence: docker compose backend check/test and frontend lint/test/build passed during WP04 review.
criteria.notes: Remote GitHub Actions execution remains a non-blocking post-merge validation.
